name: Twitter / X
description: Social networking and microblogging service founded as Twitter in 2006, rebranded to X in 2023, where users post short messages, media, and replies.

years.notes: First in-house Larry the Bird (designers Philip Pascuzzo and Douglas Bowman, 2010): asymmetric silhouette with three-circle wings, on cyan #3AAAE1. Wrapped in scale(0.08) to fit 24×24 from the source 300×300 canvas.
Refined symmetrical bird (June 2012 redesign): plumage removed, color shifted to true blue #1DA1F2. Used until the July 2023 rebrand.
X mark (July 23, 2023 rebrand under Elon Musk): stylized capital X glyph, monochrome black on white. Replaces Larry the Bird and the Twitter wordmark.
